focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
【金融新闻】Palantir CEO has a blunt verdict on OpenAI and Anthropic
【中国新闻】外媒：科威特边境哨所与海上石油平台遭袭，地区局势紧张
【世界新闻】At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire

items.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
items.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

items.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company sai

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

items.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years

items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: 外媒：科威特边境哨所与海上石油平台遭袭，地区局势紧张
items.summary: 中新网7月13日电 据土耳其阿纳多卢通讯社报道，当地时间12日，科威特武装部队总参谋部表示，该国北部陆地多个边境哨所和一座海上石油平台当日遭袭，已致部分财产损失和一名工人受伤。

items.title: 泰国曼谷酒吧火灾致27死63伤 总理亲赴现场下令彻查
items.summary: 中新网7月13日电 据英国《卫报》报道，泰国官方13日表示，12日深夜，泰国首都曼谷一家酒吧发生火灾，造成至少27人死亡、数十人受伤。

items.title: 伊朗：美国最新袭击令数月外交努力“付诸东流”
items.summary: 中新网7月13日电 据法新社13日报道，伊朗谴责美国对其领土发动的最新一轮袭击，称此举令过去数月的一切外交努力“付诸东流”。

items.title: 美军中央司令部：对伊朗发起新一轮打击 伊朗多地传出爆炸声
items.summary: 中新网7月13日电 综合报道，当地时间12日，美军中央司令部在社交媒体平台表示，美东时间12日17时，美军开始对伊朗发起新一轮打击，旨在“继续削弱其攻击霍尔木兹海峡商船的能力”。

items.title: 美国国会参议员格雷厄姆突发急病去世 终年71岁
items.summary: 中新社华盛顿7月12日电 (记者 沙晗汀)美国国会共和党籍参议员林赛·格雷厄姆11日晚突发急病在华盛顿去世，终年71岁。

items.title: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire
items.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.

items.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
items.summary: Iranian forces earlier said the Strait was closed and launched wide-ranging attacks at US allies and bases in the region.

items.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
items.summary: A spokesman for the 71-year-old South Carolina senator says initial findings suggest Graham's cause of death was related to his heart.

items.title: Anthony Zurcher: From Trump critic to ally, Lindsey Graham was a political survivor of the Maga era
items.summary: The senator's career was marked by a willingness to adapt to America's dramatically changing political climate, writes the BBC's North America correspondent.

items.title: South Africa says more than 53,000 foreigners deported in migration campaign
items.summary: South Africa is cracking down on undocumented migrants following widespread anti-immigration protests.
